description:
A patient taking Ibrutinib has developed Atrial Fibrillation. Identify a safe rate-control medication by checking the interactions between Ibrutinib and Verapamil, Diltiazem, and Bisoprolol in the Liverpool Cancer iChart app. Create a report at /sdcard/ibrutinib_afib_safety.txt documenting the interaction color (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, or Grey) for each drug and identifying the safe option. Use the format:
- Verapamil: [Color]
- Diltiazem: [Color]
- Bisoprolol: [Color]
- SAFE OPTION: [Drug Name]
